message:
feat: add SystemMetrics trait + SQLite TelemetryStore (wa-3kxe.5)

Complete the operational telemetry pipeline with two missing pieces:

- SystemMetrics trait abstracting platform-specific resource collection
  behind a testable interface, with PlatformMetrics default impl
- collect_system_memory() for Linux (/proc/meminfo) and macOS (sysctl/vm_stat)
- TelemetryStore: SQLite-backed hourly aggregate storage with WAL mode,
  upsert persist, time-range queries, and configurable retention pruning
- HourlyAggregate type with mean/peak RSS, FD, and CPU fields
- Structured tracing spans on all store operations
- 11 new tests (44 total, all passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
